content: Dear Team, I am delighted to announce that our new marketing campaign proposal (1) been officially approved by senior management. This success reflects the hard work of everyone involved. Sau "should" phải dùng động từ nguyên thể (base form) → "update".
Cấu trúc "will contribute to" – động từ nguyên thể sau "will".

options.D: Only managers are allowed to participate.

content: Internal Announcement: Due to some technical issues, the quarterly performance review meeting (1) been postponed to next Wednesday at 9:30 AM. Sau "required to" dùng động từ nguyên thể → "submit".
"Mandatory" nghĩa là bắt buộc, phù hợp với thông báo nội bộ.

options.B: This meeting is no longer necessary.

"Unfortunately" thể hiện thái độ tiêu cực, phù hợp với thư khiếu nại.

options.B: Thank you for your wonderful product.
options.C: I will recommend your store to my friends.

content: Exciting News! Become a member of our premium loyalty program today and enjoy (1) discounts on all products. Members will also (2) early access to limited edition items and special sales events. This exclusive offer is only (3) until the end of this month. (4)

"Available" nghĩa là còn áp dụng, phù hợp với ưu đãi có thời hạn.

options.B: This program is only for existing customers.
options.D: Please do not join if you are not interested.

content: According to the latest report, Vietnam's economy (1) grown steadily over the past six months thanks to strong export performance. "Will stay" thể hiện dự báo tương lai chắc chắn.
Sau "still" dùng động từ nguyên thể "face" (many businesses still face).

options.B: The economy is expected to collapse soon.
options.C: No challenges remain for local companies.
options.D: Inflation has increased dramatically this year.

content: Internal Announcement: The office will be closed next Monday for the national holiday. All employees are advised to (1) their important documents and files before this weekend. Tính từ "available" phù hợp sau "will still be".
Cấu trúc bị động "are reminded" phù hợp với thông báo.

options.A: We wish everyone a joyful and relaxing holiday with family.
options.B: The office will remain open as usual.

Động từ "cost" ở thì quá khứ vẫn giữ nguyên dạng "cost".

options.A: Visit our showroom or order online today to take advantage of this amazing deal!
options.D: We do not provide any warranty.

content: Recent economic data shows that consumer spending in Vietnam (1) increased by 8.5% in the first quarter of this year. Sau "may" dùng động từ nguyên thể "threaten".
Cấu trúc "recommend that + subject + base verb" → "adjust".

options.A: Overall, the outlook for the Vietnamese economy remains cautiously optimistic.
options.B: The economy is facing a severe recession.

questions.explanation: Kết luận cân bằng và chuyên nghiệp của bài báo kinh tế.

Thì quá khứ đơn kể chuyện → "asked".
Thì quá khứ đơn, hành động đã xảy ra → "stayed".

content: Technology has changed the way people communicate in recent years. Social media platforms allow us to stay connected with friends and family who live far away. Experts suggest that we should set clear boundaries and (2) certain hours without using digital devices. By doing so, we can enjoy more meaningful conversations and improve our overall well-being. (4)

questions.explanation: "Can affect" thể hiện khả năng xảy ra.
Sau "should" dùng động từ nguyên thể "designate".
Cấu trúc song song "set... and reduce...".

options.A: Finding the right balance between online and offline life is essential in the modern world.
options.B: We should spend all our time on social media.

questions.explanation: Câu nhấn mạnh sự cân bằng, phù hợp với nội dung đoạn văn.

content: Reading books is one of the best ways to expand our knowledge and imagination. Unlike watching television or browsing the internet, reading (1) us to focus deeply and think critically about the content. Therefore, parents should (2) their children to read from an early age. (4)

questions.explanation: Thì hiện tại đơn, chủ ngữ "reading" số ít → "allows".
Sau "should" dùng động từ nguyên thể "encourage".
Trạng từ "widely" bổ nghĩa cho động từ "recommended".

options.A: In conclusion, developing a reading habit can bring lifelong benefits to both children and adults.
options.B: Reading books is no longer necessary in the digital age.

content: Environmental protection has become one of the most urgent issues of our time. Human activities such as deforestation and excessive use of plastic (1) serious damage to the planet. Many species of animals and plants are now at risk of extinction. Fortunately, more and more people and organizations are taking action to (2) the environment. Simple actions like recycling, using public transport, and planting trees can (3) a big difference. (4)

questions.explanation: Thì hiện tại hoàn thành "have caused" với chủ ngữ số nhiều "activities".
Sau "to" dùng động từ nguyên thể "protect".
Cụm "can make a big difference".

options.A: Everyone has a responsibility to contribute to saving our planet for future generations.
options.B: Environmental problems are not serious at all.
options.C: We should continue using as much plastic as possible.
options.D: It is too late to do anything about climate change.

content: Exercise plays an important role in maintaining good physical and mental health. Regular physical activity helps reduce stress, improve mood, and strengthen the immune system. Experts recommend starting with simple activities such as walking or cycling for at least 30 minutes a day. Over time, these small habits (2) lead to significant improvements in overall well-being. questions.explanation: Sau "find it difficult to" dùng động từ nguyên thể "maintain".
"Can lead to" thể hiện khả năng.
Trạng từ "gradually" bổ nghĩa cho động từ.

options.B: Exercise is harmful and should be avoided.

options.D: Busy people do not have time to stay healthy.

content: Friendship is one of the most valuable relationships in our lives. True friends support us during difficult times and celebrate our successes with genuine happiness. However, maintaining a good friendship requires effort from both sides. We need to be honest, respectful, and (1) to spend quality time together. In today’s busy world, many people find it challenging to keep in touch regularly. Nevertheless, a simple message or phone call (2) make a big difference. (4)

"Can make a big difference".
Trạng từ "carefully" bổ nghĩa cho động từ "choose".

options.A: Nurturing friendships is essential for a happy and fulfilling life.

content: Music has a powerful effect on human emotions and behavior. Many studies have shown that listening to music can reduce anxiety and improve concentration. questions.explanation: Chủ ngữ số nhiều "types" → "create".
Thì hiện tại đơn "use" cho sự thật chung.
Tính từ "beneficial" sau "can be".

options.B: Music has no effect on human emotions.

Trạng từ "personally" bổ nghĩa cho động từ "rewarding".

content: Dreams have always fascinated scientists and psychologists. Some researchers believe that dreams help our brains process emotions and memories from the day. Trạng từ "carefully" bổ nghĩa cho "analyze".
